capabilities.implementation_notes: Add pdf_token_reduction report that compares raw document size, parsed Markdown size, and chunked retrieval payload.
capabilities.deterministic_local_implementation_path: Local PDF/OCR/parser backends produce Markdown/JSON, confidence reports, and token-reduction metrics.
capabilities.optional_llm_assisted_enhancement_path: Optional LLM may help summarize parsed Markdown or flag suspicious parse gaps, never parse by uploading raw PDFs by default.
capabilities.offline_fallback: Use builtin parsers, optional local OCR, parser confidence reports, and no-cloud-upload invariants.
capabilities.llm_dependency_policy: LLM is optional assistive layer only for token cost reduction report; Core v3.9 path must remain usable without configured providers.
